recommendations.title: GANTZ:O
recommendations.overview: After being brutally murdered in a subway station, a teen boy awakens to find himself resurrected by a strange computer named Gantz, and forced to fight a large force of invading aliens in Osaka.

recommendations.title: Creep
recommendations.overview: Trapped in a London subway station, a woman who's being pursued by a potential attacker heads into the unknown labyrinth of tunnels beneath the city's streets

recommendations.title: Beneath the Darkness
recommendations.overview: After watching their best friend get murdered, a group of teens struggle to expose a local hero as the vicious killer and keep from becoming his next victims.

recommendations.title: Siren
recommendations.overview: A bachelor party becomes a savage fight for survival when the groomsmen unwittingly unleash a fabled predator upon the festivities.

recommendations.title: The Returned
recommendations.overview: In a post-zombie world, where the infected live normal lives, their retroviral drug is running out.

recommendations.title: Striking Rescue
recommendations.overview: A veteran Muay Thai expert goes on a take-no-prisoners mission of revenge after his wife and daughter are brutally murdered by mysterious forces.

recommendations.title: Recoil
recommendations.overview: A cop turns vigilante after his family is murdered, exacting vengeance on the killers - and then on all criminals who have slipped through the system.

recommendations.title: As Above, So Below
recommendations.overview: When a team of explorers venture into the catacombs that lie beneath the streets of Paris, they uncover the dark secret that lies within this city of the dead.

recommendations.title: Die Hard
recommendations.overview: NYPD cop John McClane's plan to reconcile with his estranged wife is thrown for a serious loop when, minutes after he arrives at her office's Christmas Party, the entire building is overtaken by a group of terrorists. With little help from the LAPD,

recommendations.title: The Crow: Wicked Prayer
recommendations.overview: After ex-con Jimmy and his girlfriend are brutally murdered by a biker gang, he is resurrected by the power of The Crow to avenge their deaths and reunite with her in the afterlife.
